description: I decided to give it a try and told the people who took my money that I would try it but wanted the payments split up as I wasn’t sure if I would use it for an entire year as my company (Sotheby’s) was discussing coming out with marketing that would include an AI element. When they took my money, that did not seem to be a problem at all! When I wrote to tell them that I was cancelling my account due to the intro of AI marketing within Sotheby’s International Realty. They said too bad and sent me to collection. I will NEVER recommend them due to poor customer service and limited materials. If you have a question you could wait a long time to hear back…if you ever do. They have some chat thing but that is fairly useless. DEFINITELY A POOR INVESTMENT!! Do your research folks before you hand over your credit card! Also, they are out of the country…
author: Skye S.
pros: It initially appears very cool…until you have to deal with them with questions, etc.
cons: Customer service is Incredibly poor. They talk a good game when they are signing you up but once you are past that…good luck!

description: Recording the audio for a presentation video in the traditional ways, used to take us at least one day. And several takes, and then editing the audio. We used 3-4 different apps to do it.Now, when we already have the text ready, the creation of the audio is done in minutes!
author: Jorge P.
pros: There are now a plethora of AI apps that seemingly are doing everything we used to do in our normal and business days. So, it would be easy to miss AI Studios thinking it's "just another AI app". It's not the case here.The development of DeepBrain, AI Studios is a solid Text To Speech (TTS) program that works in minutes.But not only that, it also generates photo-realistic AI avatars (one of the most looked-after systems in the TTS world).I think that their claim that you can cut your time and costs by 80% is very real.
cons: Although it's very easy to use, there's a little learning curve, especially in dividing the text that's going to be converted to speech.If you are working in another language but English, some words are said with English pronunciation when it should not. For instance, the word "Digital" in Spanish is pronounced as English, and it sounds a little weird.Also, my last name (Pinkus) is pronounced as it were two words Pink+Us.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: This has certainly helped the flow of my content. It saved time, when I am stuck and am able to generate more ideas quickly. It does well with non fictional technical writing or self-help, etc. I have also tested it's capacity at writing apps and it does a great Job.
author: Albert A.
pros: I am a writer. It is a great way to generate ideas, when you are stuck for something to create. It gives you possible scenarios for content as well as a blue print of the work. I can enter what I want to say, in a quick "note" like format and the AI will put it into words. I can generate quick posts for my social media this way to keep my content flowing and generate engagement by generating content in advance, this way I can focus on more important areas, like creating my works for publication. I like that it can generate possible chapter titles for my books, as titling them is always the hardest part. It should be made to generate in more detail and to write better dialogue when using it for fiction writing.
cons: It is limited in it's capacity to generate based on what I enter. It will not generate more detailed content. It does not generate a specific word or page count that I ask. The content in merely basic in nature. It refuses to generate certain things if it deems it not nice even though it is mistaken. If you are not precise enough in what you ask, you will have it refusing to do the work or it will do something totally opposite. In this way, you must continue to regenerate or try coming up with other ways to ask. It is way too slow for me. It keeps stopping mid sentence and I have to continue it and in order to pick up where it left off, I have to remind it where it was cut off. It should also be able to remember past conversations and does not.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: DeepBrain AI Studio: A Powerful Tool for the Right cases
description: DeepBrain AI Studio stands out as a powerful AI agent generator that offers an extensive range of functionalities and tools for creating sophisticated AI models. The business model seems fair and the usage I flexible and great for what I need
author: jonathan D.
pros: One of the standout features of DeepBrain AI Studio is its highly user-friendly interface, which ensures effortless navigation and utilization of the platform's robust capabilities. The way they integrated the editor with chat GPT creates great boilerplate content and allows the users to swiftly create videos with believable AI agents for various applications.The performance of the generated AI agents is great, particularly in the field of natural language processing. A DeepBrain AI Studio provides an API that enables developers to integrate their AI models into their applications or systems, providing a straightforward way to leverage the platform's advanced capabilities.
cons: While DeepBrain AI Studio's avatars are among the better ones available, there is room for improvement in terms of their variety and behaviour, they do look great but they all act the same.This aspect shows that the field of AI is still in its early stages. Additionally, it's important to note that the generated AI agents may not always produce perfect results, which can be a bit unsettling at times.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
